# Custom Notebook Prompt

Use this prompt to generate a new Phi-nance experiment analysis notebook:

"Create a Jupyter notebook for analysing Phi-nance experiment runs in MLflow.
Include:
1) setup/imports,
2) run or sweep selection,
3) visualizations using `phinance.experiment.visualization`,
4) interpretation notes,
5) a final summary cell with recommended next experiments.
Keep cells modular and markdown explanations concise."
